overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a courier character with a large backpack traversing a rocky mountain valley during timefall rain. The character navigates through narrow canyon passages and over uneven terrain in a desolate, atmospheric landscape with steep rock formations and sparse vegetation.

events.description: character emerges from behind cover and begins steady forward movement through the valley
approaching and entering the narrow canyon section with rising rock walls

agents.ego_description: courier character with large backpack walking steadily through rocky terrain, navigating around boulders

entered.detail: massive gray boulder that the character emerges from behind at the start
jagged mountain peaks visible in the distant background under overcast sky
medium-sized rocks strewn across the valley floor
uneven rocky trail winding through the mountain valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character emerging from behind a large boulder into a wide rocky valley. The camera follows from behind as the character walks steadily along a gravel path, with scattered boulders on the left and distant mountain peaks ahead. The timefall rain creates a desolate atmosphere as the character approaches the entrance to a narrower canyon section.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain canyon passage with steep walls

events.description: terrain becomes darker and more enclosed as the canyon walls rise higher
character navigates around a large boulder obstructing the path on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tight canyon passage, maneuvering between rock walls and obstacles

entered.detail: steep vertical rock face forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
steep vertical rock face forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
prominent rock obstruction in the middle of the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow canyon passage flanked by steep rock walls on both sides. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the rising canyon walls as the path narrows significantly. The character continues walking forward, navigating around a large boulder in the path while the terrain gradually darkens.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark volcanic terrain with tall grass patches

events.description: exiting the narrowest canyon section into a slightly wider area with darker ground
character begins ascending a slight incline with taller vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through darker terrain with patches of tall brown grass and scattered rocks

entered.detail: darker colored volcanic-looking rock ground covering the path
brown dried grass growing in clumps between the rocks
large gray rock formation jutting out from the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow canyon, the terrain opens slightly into an area with darker volcanic rock and patches of tall brown grass. The character continues walking and begins ascending a gentle slope. The rock walls that enclosed the previous section fall behind as the path continues toward a distant mountain ridge.

events.description: approaching the mountain pass exit where the valley opens to the sky
brighter light visible through the pass as the sky becomes fully visible ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing the final slope toward the mountain ridge exit with the destination visible ahead

entered.detail: opening between mountain peaks leading to open sky and the other side of the ridge
bright overcast sky visible through the gap in the mountain range

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the end of the mountain valley through a pass between the peaks. The terrain opens up to reveal the sky ahead as the character ascends the final slope. Tall grass lines the path while the mountain walls fall away to the sides, revealing the exit from the canyon system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a wide, desolate valley that gradually constricts into a narrow, shadowed canyon. It begins with the character emerging from behind a large boulder into an expansive rocky landscape, walking along a gravel path toward distant mountain peaks under a steady timefall rain. As the character advances, the open valley begins to close in, leading the camera toward the mouth of a tighter passage. The scene then shifts as the character enters the canyon, where steep rock walls rise on both sides to obscure the sky and darken the terrain. Finally, the camera follows the character as they navigate around a large boulder within the narrowing corridor, moving deeper into the oppressive enclosure of the cliffs.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character emerges from a restrictive canyon into the expansive openness of a mountain pass. It begins by exiting a narrow gorge, where the terrain gradually opens into an area of dark volcanic rock and patches of tall brown grass. As the character ascends a gentle slope, the enclosing rock walls fall behind, shifting the perspective toward a distant mountain ridge. The scene then expands further as the character navigates a final pass between peaks, with the mountain walls receding to the sides. Finally, the path opens completely to reveal the sky ahead, marking the character's exit from the canyon system.
